userStories.title: Fix fitness-influencer README mcp-name claim
userStories.description: Add missing mcp-name ownership claim to fitness-influencer README
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'mcp-name: io.github.wmarceau/fitness-influencer' near top of README.md
Verify the line is properly formatted
userStories.notes: Required for MCP Registry ownership verification

acceptanceCriteria: Verify package is available: pip index versions instagram-creator-mcp

userStories.title: Build and publish tiktok-creator-mcp to PyPI

acceptanceCriteria: Verify package is available: pip index versions tiktok-creator-mcp

userStories.title: Verify all 9 MCPs have correct package structure
userStories.description: Run SOP 11 verification on all MCPs to ensure proper structure
acceptanceCriteria: Each MCP has pyproject.toml with correct package name
Each MCP has server.json with valid schema
Each MCP has README.md with mcp-name claim
Each MCP package directory has __init__.py with __version__
userStories.notes: MCPs: md-to-pdf, amazon-seller, apollo, rideshare-comparison, hvac-quotes, fitness-influencer, youtube-creator, instagram-creator, tiktok-creator

userStories.title: Authenticate with MCP Registry
userStories.description: Login to MCP Registry via GitHub authentication
userStories.notes: Token expires after ~1 hour, may need re-auth
